title: No feature tests cover the Spotify API routes or dynamic project metadata surfaces
reasoning: The project has a Vitest test runner configured, but this feature set includes unaudited API behavior and metadata generation with no included tests. That leaves the security-sensitive callback route, the error-fallback behavior of the Spotify endpoints, and the per-project Open Graph metadata contract prone to silent regressions during refactors or framework upgrades.
recommendation: Add focused tests for the three API routes and project metadata generation, including fallback/error cases and representative valid slugs.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: The feature declares no tests, and none are included alongside the configured Vitest setup.
suggestedRegressionTest: Create route tests for `/api/jam`, `/api/now-playing`, and `/api/spotify/callback`, plus a metadata test that verifies known slugs emit canonical URLs and Open Graph image paths.
